title: upon thunderbird start, msg at lower left says "there are no new messages", within a few sec, Tbird icon on the task bar gets a red dot with the number of new messages...yes there are some...what is wrong ?
creator: dudley7104
content:
After thunderbird starts, i see the txt at the lower left "sending login information" followed by "there are no new messages"....but a couples of seconds later, a red dot appears on the blue Tbird icon on the task bar, indicating a number of new messages received....why do these two indicators contradict each other ?

I think this began to happen when I moved my profile from win10 to a new machine on win11. Everything else seems to work fine, but I don't think that txt msg at the lower left after initialization has ever said there are new messages....since moving to the new machine & OS.

Looks like the txt portion of that message is getting information from somewhere different than the red dot on the taskbar icon is ?

title: Can you display the email addresses in their raw form, without the brackets and labels?
creator: reinhardgnath
content:
Make email addresses easily copyable.

My address book is the foundation of my office.

The email addresses are regularly copied into other programs. Unfortunately, they always appear in this format. Reinhard Gnath <info@r-gnath.de>

It's a lot of work to process the raw addresses. info@r-gnath.de

I would like a copy button for the raw email address, my dears!

The completed project should be published! I have also made a donation. bye bye

title: Fiók szinkronizálás nem működött, amíg egy fiókot le nem töröltem és vissza nem raktam
creator: sandor.kausitz
content:
Több fiókot használok Thunderbird alatt, mindegyik gmail alapú, oauth2 azonosítással.

Ma egyik fiók sem szinkronizálódott, tegnap eset még működött. A beállítások nem változtak, átnéztem őket.

Végül az egyik fiókot eltávolítottam majd hozzáadtam ugyanazokkal a beállításokkal, ezután minden fiók elkezdett szinkronizálni.

Mi okozhatta a hibát, illetve a jövőben hogy kerülhető el?

Köszi!
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36;os:Windows 11
